---
title: "About"
---

:::: {.about-header}
::: {.about-photo-col}
![](blog_photo.jpg){.about-photo}
:::
::: {.about-text-col}
I'm Hannes Coetsee, a South African t(h)inkerer, economist and data storyteller. I have experience in geospatial and remote sensing applications in central banking, time series analysis, and labour market research. My professional interests are often shaped by economic development, fairness and equality.

When I'm not thinkering, I enjoy hiking, philosophy, music (folk, latin and americana) and film. I also like cooking, although my skills are questionable.

:::
::::

<!-- SARB publication — add back when ready
I co-authored an [economic note for the SARB](https://www.resbank.co.za/en/home/publications/publication-detail-pages/occasional-bulletin-of-economic-notes/2024/updating-the-sarb-index-of-commodity-prices) on updating the commodity price index. Additional research published internally at the SARB.
-->

---

## Looking for Expertise?

I work with organisations who need to make sense of data, whether that's building an analysis from scratch, turning numbers into a story, or figuring out what the data is actually saying.

I'm available for:

- **Data analysis & modelling** — economic, geospatial, labour market, time series
- **Data storytelling** — turning complex findings into clear, compelling narratives
- **Research & writing** — economic research, policy analysis, long-form writing

[Get in touch](mailto:hannescoetsee@gmail.com?subject=Working%20together){.hire-button}
